message:
ci: Pass GITHUB_TOKEN to bun install for ripgrep download

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ahszauw7bt3n99hvhszt3t2j

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install Dependencies
         run: bun install
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Check & Lint
         run: bun run check
